## Project details

**Project name:**
<!-- e.g. go-ethereum, ethers.js, Hardhat -->

**Organisation / maintainer:**
<!-- Your name or organisation -->

**Documentation URL(s) to index:**
<!-- One URL per line. These are the pages / sections you are consenting to index. -->
- 

**GitHub repository (if applicable):**
<!-- e.g. https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum -->

---

## Display policy

<!-- Choose ONE — delete the others -->

- [ ] **`link-only`** — return URL and title only; no cached text
- [ ] **`snippet`** — return URL, title, and up to 320 characters of text
- [ ] **`fulltext`** — return URL, title, and full extracted chunk text

---

## Scope

**Include paths** (leave blank to allow all paths under the URL above):
<!-- e.g. /docs/, /api/, /reference/ -->

**Exclude paths** (paths you do NOT want indexed):
<!-- e.g. /blog/, /changelog/ -->

---

## Authority confirmation

By submitting this issue I confirm that:

- [ ] I am the copyright holder of the content at the URL(s) listed above, **or** I am authorised by the copyright holder to grant this licence.
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Consent to Index terms](https://github.com/VinitaSilaparasetty/agentic-web3-rag/blob/main/CONSENT.md).
- [ ] I understand I can revoke this consent at any time by commenting "REVOKE" on this issue or emailing info@aevoxis.de, and that all indexed content will be removed within 48 hours.
